name: Campus Rec Hosting Sound Bath & Soul Movement May 5
summary: Join Campus Rec on Tuesday, May 5 for a session that harnesses the power of sound healing, mindful movements, and intentional breathing to harmonize the mind, body, and soul. This event will be on the SRWC Lawn from 5 p.m. to 6 p.m. and is free for faculty and staff.

name: Lot Z to Close Wednesday, April 29 for Brussels Street Parking Garage Construction
summary: Lot Z will close Wednesday, April 29 to stage equipment ahead of the garage structure construction, which is anticipated to begin the second week of May. The lot will remain closed for the duration of the project. Faculty and staff parking are available in Resident Lot A.
